title: 大觀園春曉・黛玉葬花

scene.location: Daguanyuan garden with falling flower petals
scene.timeOfDay: early spring morning with soft mist
scene.weather: gentle spring breeze with petal rain

costume.layer1: light spring green silk inner layer
costume.layers: flowing Qing dynasty maiden hanfu in lake green with plum blossom embroidery, delicate silk ribbons, jade accessories, flower basket carried elegantly
costume.layer10: poetic melancholic garden silhouette with flower petals surrounding

action.pose: gracefully bending to gather fallen petals
action.gesture: one hand holding basket, other collecting blossoms gently

title: 怡紅院夏夢・寶玉讀書

title: 瀟湘館秋雨・竹影婆娑
